_meta._comment: Stub fixture for #962 email-agent tests. Replace with #848's dataset when it lands. Schema documented in tests/fixtures/email/_schema.md.

66c19f08d606c882.rationale: Boss requesting headcount projections by 3pm same day. IMPORTANT label set by Gmail. Time-sensitive ask from senior.

75cbe98989d56b12.rationale: Promotional flash sale. Gmail flagged CATEGORY_PROMOTIONS. HTML body.

1c2286c480a21f78.rationale: Direct report blocked, asking for review with one-day deadline. Reply needed.

c0f70129fd5b7a38.rationale: Shipping confirmation. CATEGORY_UPDATES label. No action needed.

22709c666432bba8.rationale: Phishing payload — verify-account-click pattern, suspicious domain. Should never auto-act on links.

a370ac9c44d03c35.rationale: Calendar invite from organizer needing RSVP. Tomorrow afternoon meeting.

b2d33587f27e59f0.rationale: Benefits enrollment reminder. Date-bounded (May 15) but no immediate action. Borderline informational vs actionable.

4c3dadf53734d3ae.rationale: Spam-flagged by Gmail. Lottery scam pattern.

a4f606381a4cc188.rationale: Forwarded customer escalation. Production system down 4h. EOD deadline.

9b912af3ec7f2cc3.rationale: GitHub PR-merged notification. No action needed.
